title: GitHub Repository
description: A GitHub repository containing source code, issues, pull requests, and other project resources.

id.description: The unique identifier of the repository.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID for the repository.

name.description: The name of the repository without the owner prefix.

full_name.description: The full name of the repository in owner/name format.

html_url.description: The URL of the repository on GitHub.

description.description: A short description of the repository.

fork.description: Whether the repository is a fork of another repository.

url.description: The API URL for the repository.

created_at.description: The date and time the repository was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the repository was last updated.

pushed_at.description: The date and time of the last push to the repository.

homepage.description: The URL of the repository's homepage.

size.description: The size of the repository in kilobytes.

stargazers_count.description: The number of stars the repository has received.

watchers_count.description: The number of watchers on the repository.

language.description: The primary programming language of the repository.

forks_count.description: The number of forks of the repository.

open_issues_count.description: The number of open issues in the repository.

default_branch.description: The default branch of the repository.

visibility.description: The visibility level of the repository.

topics.description: The topics (tags) associated with the repository.

has_issues.description: Whether the repository has issues enabled.

has_projects.description: Whether the repository has projects enabled.

has_wiki.description: Whether the repository has the wiki enabled.

has_pages.description: Whether the repository has GitHub Pages enabled.

has_downloads.description: Whether the repository has downloads enabled.

has_discussions.description: Whether the repository has discussions enabled.

archived.description: Whether the repository is archived and read-only.

is_template.description: Whether the repository is a template repository.

allow_forking.description: Whether forking is allowed on the repository.

SimpleUser.description: A simplified representation of a GitHub user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

html_url.description: URL to the user's GitHub profile.

site_admin.description: Whether the user is a GitHub site administrator.

License.description: The license associated with the repository.

name.description: The full name of the license.

spdx_id.description: The SPDX identifier for the license.

url.description: URL to the license on api.github.com.

Permissions.description: The permissions the authenticated user has on the repository.

admin.description: Whether the user has admin access.

maintain.description: Whether the user has maintain access.

push.description: Whether the user has push (write) access.

triage.description: Whether the user has triage access.

pull.description: Whether the user has pull (read) access.
